{{Infobox character
| name = Thunder Fairy
| appears_in = Cradle
| titles = Remnant
| introduced = cradle-08-wintersteel
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The Thunder Fairy is the colloquial nickname for [[Yushi]], a [[Herald]] who follows the lightning [[Path]]. Although she dislikes the title and is the subject of children's rhymes, she serves as a primary companion and right hand to [[Reigan Shen]]. In combat, [[Yushi]] utilizes storm [[madra]] and can manifest lightning from a spark on her forehead. She is an experienced combatant capable of engaging other [[Heralds]], though she can be weakened by intense fighting. Her presence is associated with the sound of thunder and lightning, and she possesses a [[Remnant]] spirit that speaks with a voice resembling wind and snapping electricity.}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Thunder Fairy]] is a source of lightning madra scales.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c15">''Wintersteel'', chapter 15</ref>}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The Thunder Fairy, who is known as [[Yushi]], is a [[Remnant]] whose voice sounds like rushing wind and snapping lightning. Following a confrontation with [[Yerin]], the entity's spirit was left in a weakened state. During this period, [[Mercy]] targeted the Thunder Fairy with arrows. Ultimately, [[Yerin]] devoured power directly from the Thunder Fairy.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Thunder Fairy]] is [[Yushi]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c13">''Waybound'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Thunder Fairy]]'s spirit was weak following a fight with [[Yerin]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c14">''Waybound'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Mercy]] sent arrows at the [[Thunder Fairy]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c15">''Waybound'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Yerin]] devoured power from the [[Thunder Fairy]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c18">''Waybound'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Thunder Fairy]] is a [[Remnant]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Thunder Fairy]]'s voice is like snapping lightning and rushing wind.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c18" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
